name: TetheCat
description: USDT (Tether) is a centralized stablecoin launched in 2014 that maintains a 1:1 peg with the U.S. dollar, designed to provide price stability in the volatile cryptocurrency market. It is the world's largest stablecoin by market capitalization, with over $150 billion in circulation as of late 2025, and serves as the primary medium of exchange and settlement layer for the global crypto ecosystem.
